title: agalinis megalantha
intro: Agalinis megalantha, also known as large-flowered agalinis or tall blue agalinis, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the United States and Canada, belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Agalinis megalantha has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal compounds.
